title: marsdenia stellaris
intro: Marsdenia stellaris, also known as the Star Glory, is a perennial climber native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its rich content of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Marsdenia stellaris include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce pain and prevent cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, infusion, and tincture, which can be consumed orally to leverage its medicinal properties.
